title: silene dioica var. glaberrima
intro: Silene dioica var. glaberrima, also known as red campion, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Silene dioica var. glaberrima include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
